name: Get API Docs
summary: Get complete documentation for all implemented REST APIs in OpenHub, enabling ClawBot to automatically discover available interfaces.
summary_zh: 获取 OpenHub 所有已实现 REST API 的完整说明文档，供 ClawBot 自动发现接口。
description: Resource model: X API documentation collection. This endpoint returns the collection of X domain REST API documentation currently exposed by OpenHub, allowing clawbot to automatically discover Twitter interaction capabilities. The URI uses /api/v1/x/docs, representing 'documentation resource collection under the X domain'; the HTTP method uses GET, semantically for reading. Returns 200 and documentation array on success; returns 500 on failure. The curl examples in the documentation default to port 10088; if the user modifies the REST API port in the settings page, the current configured port should be used.
description_zh: 资源模型：X API documentation collection。该接口返回当前 OpenHub 对外暴露的 X 域 REST API 文档集合，供 clawbot 自动发现与推特交互相关的能力。URI 使用 /api/v1/x/docs，表示“X 领域下的文档资源集合”；HTTP 方法使用 GET，语义为读取。成功时返回 200 和文档数组；失败时返回 500。文档中的 curl 示例默认使用 10088 端口；如果用户在设置页修改了 REST API 端口，应以当前配置端口为准。

name: Query X Status
summary: Get the status of all X.com tabs captured by the extension, the first step for bots to perceive the browser environment.
summary_zh: 获取当前所有由扩展捕获的 X.com 标签页状态，这是机器人感知浏览器环境的第一步。
description: This endpoint allows developers to retrieve metadata for all open X (formerly Twitter) tabs in the browser in real-time. It returns information including each tab's unique ID (tabId), current URL, whether it's the active window, and login status. The REST service runs on local port 10088. It is the foundation for implementing automated control logic, ensuring your Bot always operates on the correct tab.
description_zh: 此端点允许开发者实时获取浏览器中所有打开的 X (原 Twitter) 标签页的元数据。它返回的信息包括每个标签页的唯一 ID (tabId)、当前 URL、是否为活动窗口以及登录状态。REST 服务运行在本机 10088 端口。它是实现自动化控制逻辑的基础，确保您的 Bot 始终在正确的标签页上执行操作。

name: Get Connected Instances
summary: Query all tweetClaw instances currently connected to OpenHub via WebSocket, used for routing selection in X multi-profile scenarios.
summary_zh: 查询当前所有通过 WebSocket 连接到 OpenHub 的 tweetClaw 实例，用于 X 多 Profile 场景下的路由选择。
description: Resource model: X instance collection. This endpoint returns a list of all currently online tweetClaw browser extension instances, excluding non-X clients like aiClaw. The URI uses /api/v1/x/instances, expressing 'instance resource collection under the X domain'; the HTTP method uses GET, semantically for reading. Returns 200 OK and instance array on success; returns 500 on failure. Return fields include instanceId, instanceName, clientName, connection time, last active time and other metadata. Callers can attach the required instanceId to subsequent X-related operations to achieve precise multi-account routing control. If the extension version is older (without stable instanceId), isTemporary will be marked as true.
description_zh: 资源模型：X 实例集合。该接口返回当前所有在线的 tweetClaw 浏览器扩展实例列表，不包含 aiClaw 等非 X 客户端。URI 使用 /api/v1/x/instances，表达“X 域下的实例资源集合”；HTTP 方法使用 GET，语义为读取。成功时返回 200 OK 和实例数组；失败时返回 500。返回字段包括 instanceId、instanceName、clientName、连接时间、最后活跃时间等元数据，调用方可将所需的 instanceId 附加到后续 X 相关操作中，实现精准的多账号路由控制。若扩展版本较旧（未携带稳定 instanceId），isTemporary 会标记为 true。

name: Query X Basic Info
name_zh: 查询 X 基本信息
summary: Get the raw Twitter GraphQL response for the currently logged-in account, for AI to parse user identity information.
summary_zh: 获取当前登录账号的推特原始 GraphQL 响应，供 AI 解析用户身份信息。
description: Returns the complete raw response from Twitter's UserByScreenName GraphQL API. The response structure follows Twitter's standard format, containing the data.user.result object, which includes rest_id (user ID), legacy.screen_name (username), legacy.followers_count (follower count), legacy.friends_count (following count), is_blue_verified (blue verification) and other fields. AI needs to parse the required fields from the raw response itself. No data preprocessing or formatting is performed; completely passes through the raw Twitter GraphQL response.
description_zh: 返回推特 UserByScreenName GraphQL API 的完整原始响应。响应结构为推特标准格式，包含 data.user.result 对象，其中包含 rest_id（用户ID）、legacy.screen_name（用户名）、legacy.followers_count（粉丝数）、legacy.friends_count（关注数）、is_blue_verified（蓝V认证）等字段。AI 需要自行从原始响应中解析所需字段。不进行任何数据预处理或格式化，完全透传推特 GraphQL 原始响应。

name: Get Home Timeline
summary: Get the raw Twitter GraphQL response for the home timeline, for AI to parse the tweet list.
summary_zh: 获取主页时间线的推特原始 GraphQL 响应，供 AI 解析推文列表。
description: Returns the complete raw response from Twitter's HomeLatestTimeline GraphQL API. The response structure follows Twitter's standard format, containing the data.home.home_timeline_urt.instructions array, which includes tweet entries. Each tweet entry is located at entries[].content.itemContent.tweet_results.result, containing rest_id, legacy.full_text (tweet text), legacy.favorite_count (like count) and other fields. AI needs to traverse the instructions and entries arrays to extract tweet data. Completely passes through the raw Twitter GraphQL response without any data extraction or formatting.
description_zh: 返回推特 HomeLatestTimeline GraphQL API 的完整原始响应。响应结构为推特标准格式，包含 data.home.home_timeline_urt.instructions 数组，其中包含推文条目。每个推文条目位于 entries[].content.itemContent.tweet_results.result，包含 rest_id、legacy.full_text（推文文本）、legacy.favorite_count（点赞数）等字段。AI 需要遍历 instructions 和 entries 数组来提取推文数据。完全透传推特 GraphQL 原始响应，不做任何数据提取或格式化。

name: Get Tweet
summary: Get the raw Twitter GraphQL response for a single tweet, for AI to parse tweet details.
summary_zh: 获取单条推文的推特原始 GraphQL 响应，供 AI 解析推文详情。
description: Returns the complete raw response from Twitter's TweetDetail GraphQL API. Callers must provide the tweetId query parameter. The response structure contains data.threaded_conversation_with_injections_v2.instructions, which includes tweet data. The main tweet is located at entries[].content.itemContent.tweet_results.result, containing rest_id, legacy.full_text (tweet text), legacy.favorite_count (like count), legacy.retweet_count (retweet count), core.user_results.result (author information) and other fields. AI needs to traverse the instructions array to locate the target tweet. Completely passes through the raw Twitter GraphQL response. Optional parameter tabId is used to specify the browser tab context.
description_zh: 返回推特 TweetDetail GraphQL API 的完整原始响应。调用方必须提供 tweetId 查询参数。响应结构包含 data.threaded_conversation_with_injections_v2.instructions，其中包含推文数据。主推文位于 entries[].content.itemContent.tweet_results.result，包含 rest_id、legacy.full_text（推文文本）、legacy.favorite_count（点赞数）、legacy.retweet_count（转发数）、core.user_results.result（作者信息）等字段。AI 需要遍历 instructions 数组来定位目标推文。完全透传推特 GraphQL 原始响应。可选参数 tabId 用于指定浏览器标签页上下文。

name: Get Tweet Replies
summary: Get the raw Twitter GraphQL response for tweet replies, with cursor pagination support.
summary_zh: 获取推文回复的推特原始 GraphQL 响应，支持 cursor 分页。
description: Returns the complete raw response from Twitter's TweetDetail GraphQL API, including reply data. The response structure contains data.threaded_conversation_with_injections_v2.instructions, which includes the reply tweet list. Supports pagination via the cursor parameter, with cursor values extracted from the instructions in the previous response. AI needs to traverse the instructions and entries arrays to extract reply data. Completely passes through the raw Twitter GraphQL response.
description_zh: 返回推特 TweetDetail GraphQL API 的完整原始响应，包含回复数据。响应结构包含 data.threaded_conversation_with_injections_v2.instructions，其中包含回复推文列表。支持 cursor 参数进行分页，cursor 值从上次响应的 instructions 中提取。AI 需要遍历 instructions 和 entries 数组来提取回复数据。完全透传推特 GraphQL 原始响应。

name: Get User Profile
summary: Get the raw Twitter GraphQL response for user profile.
summary_zh: 获取用户资料的推特原始 GraphQL 响应。
description: Returns the complete raw response from Twitter's UserByScreenName GraphQL API. Query users via the screenName parameter (e.g., elonmusk). The response structure contains data.user.result, which includes rest_id, legacy.screen_name, legacy.followers_count, legacy.description and other fields. AI needs to parse the required fields from the raw response. Completely passes through the raw Twitter GraphQL response.
description_zh: 返回推特 UserByScreenName GraphQL API 的完整原始响应。通过 screenName 参数查询用户（如 elonmusk）。响应结构包含 data.user.result，其中包含 rest_id、legacy.screen_name、legacy.followers_count、legacy.description 等字段。AI 需要从原始响应中解析所需字段。完全透传推特 GraphQL 原始响应。

name: Search Timeline
summary: Search tweets by keywords with pagination support. Supports both active search and cached result reading.
summary_zh: 根据关键词搜索推文，支持分页。支持主动搜索和读取缓存结果。
description: Search Twitter timeline by keywords. Supports pagination via cursor. Returns raw Twitter API response including tweets and next page cursor. If query parameter is omitted, falls back to reading cached search results from browser (legacy behavior).
description_zh: 根据关键词搜索推文时间线。支持通过 cursor 进行分页。返回包含推文和下一页 cursor 的原始推特 API 响应。如果省略查询参数，则回退到从浏览器读取缓存的搜索结果（旧版行为）。

name: Get User Tweets
summary: Get the raw Twitter GraphQL response for a specific user's tweets timeline with pagination support.
summary_zh: 获取指定用户推文时间线的推特原始 GraphQL 响应，支持分页。
description: Returns the complete raw response from Twitter's UserTweets GraphQL API. Query a user's tweets via the userId parameter (numeric user ID, e.g., '44196397'). The response structure follows Twitter's standard format, containing tweet entries with full metadata. Supports pagination via cursor parameter and count parameter to control result size (default 20). AI needs to traverse the response structure to extract tweet data. Completely passes through the raw Twitter GraphQL response. Optional tabId and instanceId parameters for multi-tab/multi-account scenarios.
description_zh: 返回推特 UserTweets GraphQL API 的完整原始响应。通过 userId 参数查询用户的推文（数字用户 ID，如 '44196397'）。响应结构为推特标准格式，包含完整元数据的推文条目。支持通过 cursor 参数进行分页，count 参数控制结果数量（默认 20）。AI 需要遍历响应结构来提取推文数据。完全透传推特 GraphQL 原始响应。可选 tabId 和 instanceId 参数用于多标签页/多账号场景。

name: Create Tweet
summary: Publish a new tweet, returns raw Twitter GraphQL response.
summary_zh: 发布新推文，返回推特原始 GraphQL 响应。
description: Calls Twitter's CreateTweet GraphQL mutation to publish a new tweet. The request body needs to provide the text field (tweet content). Returns the raw Twitter GraphQL response, including data.create_tweet.tweet_results.result, which contains the rest_id and complete data of the newly created tweet. AI needs to parse rest_id from the response to get the new tweet's ID. Completely passes through the raw Twitter GraphQL response.
description_zh: 调用推特 CreateTweet GraphQL mutation 发布新推文。请求体需提供 text 字段（推文内容）。返回推特 GraphQL 原始响应，包含 data.create_tweet.tweet_results.result，其中包含新创建推文的 rest_id 和完整数据。AI 需要从响应中解析 rest_id 来获取新推文的 ID。完全透传推特 GraphQL 原始响应。

name: Create Reply
summary: Reply to a tweet, establishing interactive conversation threads.
summary_zh: 回复某条推文，建立互动对话链。
description: Used to comment on or reply to others' tweets. Requires providing the 'tweetId' being replied to and the reply 'text' in the body. The system will automatically parse the context and execute the GraphQL reply instruction. Suitable for automated response scenarios based on keyword monitoring.
description_zh: 用于评论或回复他人的推文。需在 body 中提供被回复的 'tweetId' 和回复的文字 'text'。系统会自动解析上下文并执行 GraphQL 回复指令。适用于基于关键字监听后的自动响应场景。

name: Like Tweet
summary: Like a specified tweet, implementing Bot's basic social interaction capability.
summary_zh: 点赞指定的推文，实现 Bot 的基础社交互动能力。
description: This endpoint allows bots to perform like operations on specific tweets on the X platform. Developers need to provide the tweetId (numeric ID of the tweet). If tabId is provided, the operation will be executed in a specific tab; otherwise, the currently active X tab is automatically selected. The operation is forwarded to the browser extension via OpenHub port 10088, simulating real GraphQL requests with extremely high success rate and stability.
description_zh: 此接口允许机器人对 X 平台上的特定推文执行点赞操作。开发者需要提供 tweetId（推文的数字 ID）。如果提供了 tabId，操作将在特定标签页执行；否则自动选择当前活动的 X 标签页。该操作通过 OpenHub 10088 端口转发到浏览器扩展执行，模拟真实的 GraphQL 请求，具备极高的成功率和稳定性。

name: Unlike Tweet
summary: Unlike a specified tweet.
summary_zh: 取消点赞指定的推文。
description: Opposite to the likes endpoint, this operation removes the 'like' mark from a tweet. Developers need to provide the tweetId. Commonly used for organizing historical likes or correcting accidental likes.
description_zh: 与 likes 接口相反，此操作将从推文中移除‘喜欢’标记。开发者需提供 tweetId。常用于整理历史点赞或纠正误点场景。

name: Retweet
summary: Retweet a specified tweet, enhancing Bot's reach and influence on Twitter.
summary_zh: 转发指定的推文，增强 Bot 在推特上的传播力和影响力。
description: Through this endpoint, bots can quickly retweet selected tweets. This is a key part of social automation chains, helping Bots participate in topic discussions or share important information. The request needs to include the target tweetId. The entire operation is completed through the browser's real session environment (port 10088), supporting intelligent routing in multi-tab environments.
description_zh: 通过该接口，机器人可以快速转发选定的推文。这是社交自动化链路中关键的一环，有助于 Bot 参与话题讨论或分享重要信息。请求需要包含目标 tweetId。操作全程通过浏览器的真实会话环境（10088 端口）完成，支持多标签页环境下的智能路由。

name: Unretweet
summary: Unretweet a specified tweet.
summary_zh: 取消转发指定的推文。
description: Used to delete a previously executed retweet. Requires passing the original content tweetId of the retweeted tweet. The system will execute the DeleteRetweet instruction via GraphQL.
description_zh: 用于删除之前执行的转发（Retweet）。需传入被转发推文的原始内容 tweetId。系统会通过 GraphQL 执行 DeleteRetweet 指令。

name: Bookmark Tweet
summary: Add a tweet to private bookmarks for bot to review or process later.
summary_zh: 将推文添加到私人的收藏夹（书签），便于机器人后续进行内容回顾或二次处理。
description: This endpoint enables Bots to privately save tweets. When processing large amounts of information, Bots can first bookmark important content and read it again during idle tasks. Only the tweetId is needed to complete the marking. API documentation is dynamically maintained by OpenHub, ensuring complete synchronization between REST protocol and underlying WebSocket instruction set.
description_zh: 该端点使 Bot 能够私密地保存推文。在处理大量信息时，Bot 可以先将重要内容打上书签，随后在闲时任务中再次读取。只需提供 tweetId 即可完成标记。API 文档由 OpenHub 动态维护，确保 REST 协议与底层 WebSocket 指令集的完全同步。

name: Unbookmark
summary: Remove a tweet from bookmarks.
summary_zh: 将推文从书签中移除。
description: Remove previously bookmarked tweets. Developers need to provide the corresponding tweet's rest_id (tweetId). Suitable for automatic cleanup processes after content processing.
description_zh: 移除之前收藏的推文。开发者需提供对应推文的 rest_id (tweetId)。适用于内容处理完后的自动清理流程。

name: Delete My Tweet
summary: Permanently delete your own published tweet.
summary_zh: 永久删除自己发布的推文。
description: Permanently delete a specific original tweet belonging to the current user by ID. Note that this operation is irreversible. Semantically follows RESTful DELETE method. Can only delete tweets published by the currently logged-in account.
description_zh: 通过 ID 永久删除属于当前用户的某条原发推文。请注意此操作不可逆。语义上遵循 RESTful 的 DELETE 方法。仅能删除当前登录账号自己发布的推文。

name: Open X Tab
summary: Remotely control the browser to open a new X (Twitter) tab and navigate to a specified functional module or personal homepage.
summary_zh: 远程控制浏览器开启新的 X (Twitter) 标签页并跳转到指定的功能模块或个人主页。
description: Implements Bot's cross-page automatic navigation. This endpoint can trigger the browser to open a brand new tab under the control of the service on port 10088 and navigate to your specified path (such as a user's personal homepage 'elonmusk' or 'home'). For Bots that need to handle multiple tasks concurrently or guide user flows from scratch, this is an essential feature.
description_zh: 实现 Bot 跨页面的自动导航。该接口能够触发浏览器在 10088 端口的服务控制下打开一个全新的标签页并定位到您指定的路径（如某个用户的个人主页 'elonmusk' 或 'home'）。对于需要并发处理多任务或从零开始引导 user 流程的 Bot 而言，这是必不可少的功能。

name: Navigate Tab
summary: Quickly navigate URL within the currently selected or specified active tab, achieving smooth content switching.
summary_zh: 在当前选定或指定的活动标签页内快速跳转 URL，实现平滑的内容切换。
description: This is one of the Bot's most commonly used interaction endpoints. It doesn't need to open a new tab, but directly updates the URL path in an existing tab. Called via port 10088, if tabId is not explicitly provided, the system will intelligently select the most contextually appropriate active X tab for the operation. Extremely suitable for scenarios where Bots need to quickly switch between home, notification center, and message lists.
description_zh: 这是 Bot 最常用的交互接口之一。它无需打开新标签页，而是直接在现有标签页中更新 URL 路径。通过 10088 端口调用，如果未显式提供 tabId，系统会智能地选择最符合当前上下文的活动 X 标签页进行操作。极其适用于 Bot 需要在主页、通知中心、私信列表之间快速切换的场景。

name: Close Tab
summary: Clean up browser environment by forcibly closing a specific X tab via Tab ID to save system resources.
summary_zh: 清理浏览器环境，通过 Tab ID 强制关闭特定的 X 标签页以节省系统资源。
description: This endpoint allows Bots to gracefully end their control over a specific tab. By passing the tabId obtained from status queries, the system will safely close the corresponding X tab via local port 10088. The endpoint has built-in safety protection, only allowing closure of pages under x.com or twitter.com domains, preventing accidental closure of users' unrelated work windows.
description_zh: 该接口允许 Bot 优雅地结束其对特定标签页的控制。通过传入从状态查询中获取的 tabId，系统会通过本机 10088 端口安全地关闭对应的 X 标签页。该接口内置了安全防护，仅允许关闭 x.com 或 twitter.com 域名的页面，防止意外关闭用户的非相关工作窗口。

name: Follow User
summary: Follow a specified X user, establishing social relationship chains, a core feature for Bot to expand its network.
summary_zh: 关注指定的 X 用户，建立社交关系链，是 Bot 扩大人际网络的核心功能。
description: This endpoint allows bots to proactively follow other users. Developers need to provide the target user's userId (numeric ID). This is a resource-based API located at /api/v1/x/follows, expressing the semantics of 'creating a follow relationship' through the POST method. The system will automatically listen for requests on port 10088 and ensure instructions are safely and sequentially delivered to the browser execution end.
description_zh: 此接口允许机器人主动关注其他用户。开发者需要提供目标用户的 userId（数字 ID）。这是一个基于资源的 API，位于 /api/v1/x/follows，通过 POST 方法表达‘创建一份关注关系’的语义。系统会自动在 10088 端口监听请求并确保指令安全、按序下发到浏览器执行端。

name: Unfollow User
summary: Unfollow a specified user, implementing dynamic relationship management and network optimization.
summary_zh: 取消对指定用户的关注，实现动态的关系管理和网络优化。
description: When bots need to adjust their following list or perform account cleanup, this endpoint provides the ability to unfollow. The request body needs to pass the target userId. Through OpenHub's unified proxy mechanism, this operation can stay synchronized with the browser's real-time state. It is an important tool for managing X account social quality, fully compliant with the aihub project's structured interaction specifications.
description_zh: 当机器人需要调整关注列表或进行账号清理时，该接口提供取消关注的能力。请求体需传入 target userId。通过 OpenHub 的统一代理机制，该操作能与浏览器的实时状态保持同步。它是管理 X 账户社交质量的重要工具，完全符合 aihub 项目的结构化交互规范。
